overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing an astronaut character exploring an industrial mining facility at night. The character ascends multiple levels of metal walkways and stairs built into rocky cliffs, transitioning from outdoor industrial platforms to an interior stone corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with metal walkways and rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridor and climbing first set of metal stairs

entered.detail: steep metal stairs with railings leading upward along rock face
rough rocky cliff face forming corridor wall
metal grating floor with safety railings
rectangular industrial light fixture mounted overhead

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow industrial corridor with metal walkways and rock walls. Walking forward, they approach and begin ascending a steep metal staircase on the left side, moving from the lower level toward an upper platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with chain link fencing

events.description: emerges from enclosed corridor onto open elevated platform
approaching illuminated tunnel entrance with yellow interior light

agents.ego_description: walking across elevated walkway toward distant tunnel entrance

entered.detail: metal mesh fencing along walkway edge
dark tunnel opening with industrial metal framing
vertical metal poles with mounted lights

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open elevated platform, the character walks along a fenced industrial walkway. The chain-link fence lines the right side as they approach a distant tunnel entrance that glows with yellow light, transitioning from the narrow corridor to a more open elevated space.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep metal staircase ascending cliff face with mountain views

events.description: turns left and begins ascending second staircase
reaches upper level with open view of mountain landscape

agents.ego_description: turning left and climbing steep stairs along rock face with mountain vista visible

entered.detail: steep metal stairs with open risers built into cliff
rocky mountain peaks silhouetted against dark night sky
tall industrial pole with bright spotlight
elevated metal structure with safety railings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the tunnel and begins ascending a second steep staircase. As they climb higher, the mountain range becomes visible in the background against the night sky, with industrial platforms and spotlights marking the upper levels of the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: high elevation catwalk along cliffside with panoramic mountain views

events.description: mountain landscape becomes fully visible in background
approaching and entering doorway into interior space

agents.ego_description: walking along high catwalk with mountain views, approaching building entrance

entered.detail: doorway with warm yellow interior light glowing
bright spotlights mounted on building facade
narrow metal walkway with railings along rock face

segments.scene_description: Walking along a high cliffside catwalk, the character enjoys panoramic views of the mountainous terrain. They approach a building entrance marked by bright exterior lights and a warmly lit doorway, transitioning from the open catwalk toward the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stone corridor with warm lighting

events.description: enters interior space with warm artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: entering building and walking through warmly lit stone corridor

entered.detail: rough hewn stone block walls with warm lighting
metal door at end of corridor
warm rectangular light fixture on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters the building, transitioning from the cold industrial exterior to a warmly lit interior stone corridor with wooden floors. They walk toward a metal door at the end of the hallway, illuminated by overhead lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an astronaut ascends through a cold, industrial mining facility before entering a warmly lit interior. It begins in a narrow corridor of metal walkways and rock walls, moving forward to climb a steep staircase toward an upper level. As the character emerges onto an open elevated platform, the scene expands along a fenced walkway toward a glowing yellow tunnel entrance before turning to ascend a second set of stairs. The camera then opens up to a panoramic view of a dark mountain range and spotlights on the high cliffside catwalk, moving steadily toward a brightly lit building entrance. Finally, the environment shifts from the industrial exterior into a stone corridor with wooden floors, following the character toward a metal door under the glow of overhead lights.
